title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into Contract for the Services of Mr. Mark John R. Millan As Consultant for Capability Building with Corresponding Monthly Compensation of Thirty Thousand Pesos (P 30,000.00). Councilor Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap 01/23/2023
